jalapeno-creamed-corn.name: Jalapeño Creamed Corn
instructions: Melt cream cheese and butter together in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add corn, Cheddar cheese, butter, and jalapeños; cook and stir until sauce is smooth and mixture is hot, about 10 minutes.

jam-session-sherry-and-watermelon-cockta.name: Jam Session (sherry And Watermelon Cocktail)

ingredients.prep: plus more for garnishing each glass

instructions: In a pitcher filled halfway with ice, add the fino sherry, ginger kombucha, and watermelon juice. Top with more ice. Stir to chill and incorporate ingredients. Garnish with cucumber slices.

juicy-chops-in-red-sauce-comedera.name: Juicy Chops In Red Sauce
instructions: Dig the chops and leave them in the refrigerator for 10 minutes.
In a pot with boiling water place the tomato, onion, garlic and chilies (all these whole, unminced ingredients).
Eat for 10 minutes and then polish with some cooking water till you get a sauce without clubs. Reserve.
Warm olive oil in a frying pan and seal the cheks.
Cooking for 3 minutes, then pour the red sauce onto top.
Cover and cook with low heat for 10 minutes.
Serve chops in salsa and enjoy them.
